channel.title: v3.4.3 on XSpec
channel.description: Recent content in v3.4.3 on XSpec

item.title: Release XSpec v3.4.3
item.description: Release XSpec v3.4.3 XSpec 3.4 adds more entry points to the support for XQS as the Schematron implementation. These are the highlights of XSpec v3.4: Common to Languages Under Test After x:context or x:call, the x:variable and x:like elements can appear in any order and can be mixed. For example, the following sequence is valid: x:call, x:variable, x:like, x:variable, x:like Requires Java 17 or later. XSpec is tested with Java 17 and 21.
